prompts.name: More Story
prompts.text: Strengthen the story by making the subject, pose, props, lighting, and setting feel connected to a clear moment.

prompts.name: More Depth
prompts.text: Increase visual depth using layered foreground, midground, and background details with controlled focus.

prompts.name: More Texture
prompts.text: Increase material texture on clothing, surfaces, props, skin, hair, and environment while keeping the image clean.

prompts.name: More Motion
prompts.text: Add a sense of motion through hair, clothing, pose, environmental particles, or directional composition.

prompts.name: More Intimacy
prompts.text: Make the scene feel more intimate with closer framing, softer expression, gentle lighting, and reduced background distraction.

prompts.name: More Scale
prompts.text: Make the scene feel larger in scale with distant structures, wide framing, atmospheric perspective, and grand environmental cues.

prompts.name: More Warmth
prompts.text: Increase warmth through soft color, gentle lighting, welcoming atmosphere, and emotionally approachable expression.

prompts.name: More Drama
prompts.text: Increase drama through stronger lighting contrast, clear silhouette, expressive pose, and purposeful composition.

prompts.name: More Cuteness
prompts.text: Increase cuteness through softer expression, rounded shapes, gentle posture, bright eyes, and charming details.

prompts.name: More Elegance
prompts.text: Increase elegance through refined posture, clean lines, tasteful accessories, graceful fabrics, and balanced composition.

prompts.name: More Realism
prompts.text: Increase realism through believable lighting, natural anatomy, material accuracy, grounded environment, and subtle imperfections.

prompts.name: More Fantasy
prompts.text: Increase fantasy through magical details, ornate design, glowing accents, and imaginative environment elements.

prompts.name: More Cinematic
prompts.text: Increase cinematic feeling through intentional framing, controlled lighting, story-focused composition, and cohesive color grade.

prompts.name: More Polish
prompts.text: Increase polish by refining edges, balancing exposure, clarifying details, and improving overall visual harmony.

prompts.name: More Focus
prompts.text: Increase focus on the main subject by reducing visual clutter, strengthening contrast, and guiding the eye clearly.
